name: Lasagne Frutta
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pureed cheese with the egg yolk, sugar, and lemon juice.
2. Grate the lemon peel and add with raisins and half of the pistachios.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into all ingredients.
4. Peel apples and core, then cut into small strips.
5. Boil noodles for about 3 minutes; quickly run under cold water.
6. In a small lasagne pan, alternate layers of noodles, apples, and cheese mixture, ending with cheese.
7. Bake dish for 40 minutes at 175°C in a preheated oven.
8. Before serving, sprinkle the remaining pistachios on top.
